title: hearth-loom.ac.verified v1
description: Emitted once per acceptance-criteria bullet executed during a hearth-loom loomie run. Captures the extracted bash command, its exit code, captured stdout/stderr (truncated to 4096 chars with a [...truncated] marker when over the cap), wall-clock duration, and bullet provenance (bead_id, exec_id, ac_index, ac_text). Foundation for closing the phantom-AC-passes gap (sibling epic hearth-loom-loom-o4cc5): once these events flow, downstream consumers can populate AcceptanceYAML, enforce the merge gate on actual evidence, and surface per-bullet exit codes to reviewers. Pure observability — gate semantics live elsewhere. Source: /hearth-loom/executor.

bead_id.description: Bead id this acceptance criterion was verified for (e.g. nervous-bus-6kwv)

exec_id.description: Loomie execution identifier — correlates to loom.lifecycle.v1 execution_id

ac_index.description: 0-based index of this acceptance bullet within the bead's AC list

ac_text.description: Prose AC bullet text (truncated to 500 chars)

command.description: Bash command extracted from the AC bullet (truncated to 1000 chars)

exit_code.description: Process exit code of the bash command. 0 = pass; non-zero = fail

duration_ms.description: Wall-clock duration of the command in milliseconds

ts.description: RFC3339 UTC timestamp at command completion

stdout.description: Captured stdout, truncated to 4096 chars. Includes a [...truncated] suffix when the underlying output exceeded the cap.

stderr.description: Captured stderr, truncated to 4096 chars. Includes a [...truncated] suffix when the underlying output exceeded the cap.

working_dir.description: Working directory the command ran in (typically /shuttle for loomie executions)

correlation_id.description: Optional ULID linking this verification to a producer-triggered subagent request
